sprints.question: Phase 1 — HTML/CSS Surgery: Delete demo-layer overlay (lines 136-138, 235, 339, 358-393), delete attract mode FSM (lines 2161-2370), delete enterDemo/exitDemo (lines 836-880), delete hash route handler (lines 2108-2118). Move #demo-question input into .ui landing. Move #claimsArea, .compile-row, .compiler-output into landing flow. Update .ui to position:fixed;inset:0;overflow-y:auto;padding-top:35vh. Claim cards use background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85) not backdrop-filter. Per cal026, cal027, w2540, x572, x580.
Phase 2 — JS Rewire (completed in Phase 1 surgery)
Phase 3 — Mobile + PWA (completed in Phase 1 surgery)
Phase 5 — Handoff + Share (Web Share API added)
